data.title: Pharming Group announces the filing of its 2025 Annual Report and Form 20-F
data.description: Pharming Group made an announcement today regarding the submission of its Annual Report for the year 2025, along with the Annual Report on Form 20-F. These reports can be accessed at annualreport.pharming.com.

data.title: Tallinna Sadam audited Annual Report 2025 and dividend proposal
data.description: The governing board of AS Tallinna Sadam (referred to as "Tallinna Sadam") has endorsed the audited yearly report for 2025 as presented by the executive board. The audited financial results remain consistent with the unaudited interim report released on 26 February, showing no variations.

data.title: LHV Varahaldus extends the term of office of a Supervisory Board Member
data.description: AS LHV Group, the only shareholder, has chosen to prolong the tenure of Andres Viisemann, a Supervisory Board member of its subsidiary AS LHV Varahaldus, by an additional five years. Viisemann will now serve until 01 April 2031.
Announcement: Annual General Meeting of Shareholders of Tallinna Sadam called for (date), with total 85% attendance required.

data.title: Company sells Bitcoin to settle $8.5M debt as part of increasing trend of treasuries doing so this year, except for Michael Saylor's Strategy.
data.description: This year, a prominent AI and cryptocurrency firm has joined the trend of Bitcoin treasuries being sold off, while Michael Saylor's strategy has diverged from this pattern.

data.title: Accused Huione money laundering leader sent to China for involvement in scam networks and crypto frauds.
data.description: It has been reported that Huione Group is accused of aiding in the laundering of funds obtained from scam networks based in Southeast Asia. These networks are allegedly responsible for various fraudulent schemes, including "pig butchering" scams and other cryptocurrency-related frauds. The group is suspected of facilitating the laundering of a significant amount of money through these illicit activities.

data.title: Think tank advises Taiwan to reassess Bitcoin reserve amid war threats. Ministry holds 210 Bitcoins valued at $14 million.
data.description: According to Taiwanese legislator Ko Ju-Chun, it was revealed last year that the Ministry of Justice in Taiwan possesses 210 Bitcoins seized during criminal probes, which amounts to approximately $14 million.

data.title: GDC IT Solutions Announces Strategic Asset Acquisition of Global Help Desk Services, Inc., Expanding 100% U.S.-Based Outsourced IT Service Desk Capabilities
data.description: GDC IT Solutions, based in Chambersburg, Pennsylvania, recently announced the acquisition of Global Help Desk Services, Inc. (GHDSi). This move marks an expansion in their IT service desk capabilities, now offering 24/7 support internationally. The acquisition brings together two reputable companies to enhance their services and reach a broader client base.
USD/JPY up 0.38%, last at 159.375.
